Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Set For Trial On Jun-10-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Claim; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Douglas J. Lief, Esq. In Support Thereof;
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

DEFENDANTS STEPHANIE ROULLAND, 3RE1 LLC, and ROULLAND ESTATES LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE PUNITIVE DAMAGES CLAIM is DENIED. Plaintiff sufficiently pleads facts to support a claim for punitive damages. Defendant's second request that Plaintiff "elect" between their causes of action is denied.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
